placement.title: Let's measure your starting level
placement.description: This is an adaptive test: it picks each next question to match your ability as you go, covering memory, logical reasoning, numbers, attention and pattern recognition. It usually takes 15-25 questions and ends automatically once your level is measured precisely enough.

placement.adaptiveNote: This test adapts to your answers - the number of questions may vary.
